# Input

Collects short-form text from a user.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/input
```

## Examples

```tsx
<Input aria-label="Email" placeholder="hello@stalk-ui.com" />
```

```tsx
<Input invalid aria-label="Email" placeholder="Invalid email" />
```

```tsx
<Input disabled aria-label="Disabled input" placeholder="Disabled" />
```

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/input.json`
- Recipe: `input`
- Files: `src/components/ui/input.tsx`
